name: Kwan's Sweet & Sour Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, salt, and vinegar in a small saucepan.
2. Heat over medium heat until the sugar and salt are dissolved, stirring occasionally.
This is an all-purpose sauce that can be used as a base for other sauces. It will keep for about 6 months in a covered jar in the refrigerator.
